rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Additional Time To Complete Pltf Albert Levene'S Deposition; And For Monetary Sanctions For Pltfs' Counsel'S Failure To Meet And Confer
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, December 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Volkswagen Group of America, Inc. and Volvo Cars of North America, LLC¿s motion for additional time to complete Plaintiff Albert Levene¿s Deposition, and for monetary sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. Defendants have shown good cause for 8.5 additional hours. Monetary sanctions are denied. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am. = (503/TLJ)
